title: tragacantha chrysophylla
intro: Tragacantha chrysophylla, also known as the yellow flowering goat's-thorn, is a type of plant that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tragacantha chrysophylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
